title: Tax' Cave Reader
description: Cave Reader is a Minecraft modification aims to add horror themed lore. The legendary story of Playa, rare records (audiobooks) said to exist only in dungeon chests.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90803e5c1d7e9555a4f411dd9b81aaf85a99af2e.png)

Overview:
Cave Reader is a Minecraft modification aims to add horror themed lore. The legendary story of Playa, rare records (audiobooks) said to exist only in dungeon chests.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52bda2ab4c4fe429d779d7790945a74d14f64b7c.png)

Cooperation:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack.
![chp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cddfa2804d4ac7bebe5d30295f4687bb7fd42b94.png)

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .jar file in the folder located at .mineraft/mods, or just simply use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax.
